series_metadata.series_description: Hospitals may appeal the payment amount of their bill by submitting supporting documentation and justification for any changes. The Hospital Reimbursement Review (HRR) Unit reviews the appeal and issues a response to the hospital via email or in letter form.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Hospital Reimbursement Appeals in HRR Unit resolution, provided audited by Auditor of State, audit report is release, and ; Electronic: Hospital Reimbursement Appeals in HRR Unit resolution, provided audited by Auditor of State, audit report is release, and
